markets.question: Spread: Shanghai Shenhua FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Shanghai Shenhua FC" if Shanghai Shenhua FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Beijing Guoan FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Beijing Guoan FC vs. Shanghai Shenhua FC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Beijing Guoan FC and Shanghai Shenhua FC, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Beijing Guoan FC and Shanghai Shenhua FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Beijing Guoan FC vs. Shanghai Shenhua FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Beijing Guoan FC and Shanghai Shenhua FC, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Beijing Guoan FC and Shanghai Shenhua FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Will the price of Solana be above $30 on March 14?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for SOL/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Liaoning Tieren FC and Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Liaoning Tieren FC and Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
